parameters.subject: Confirmation of Application Details – StepOne Investing
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.Name }},

We are pleased to know that you are interested in joining StepOne Investing.

Attached below are the details you have submitted during your application process. We request you to kindly review the information and confirm that all details provided are accurate and true to the best of your knowledge.

Please also confirm that you have applied to join StepOne Investing of your own accord after carefully reading and agreeing to our Terms and Conditions.

Kindly reply with either "Yes" or "No" without any further remarks. Please ensure your response is sent within the next 15 minutes to maintain the current project timeline.

If you reply “Yes”, your Investor ID will be generated and communicated to you within 24–48 hours.

If you reply “No”, your application will be automatically removed from our system.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Warm regards,
Team StepOne Investing

nodes.name: Get row(s) in sheet Host Gmail
If Check Empty or Not empty

parameters.subject: Acknowledgement of Your Response - StepOne Investing
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.extractedName }},

Thank you for your response.

We understand and respect your decision at this time. We truly appreciate the opportunity to connect with you and introduce StepOne Investing.

Should you wish to explore investment opportunities with us in the future, we would be pleased to assist you. Our team will remain available for any questions or support you may need.

Wishing you continued success in all your endeavors.

Warm regards,
Team StepOne Investing

parameters.subject: Welcome to StepOne Investing – Your Client ID Details
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.Name }},

We are delighted to welcome you to StepOne Investing as an Individual Investor and Shareholder.

Your Client ID is {{ $json['Client ID'] }}
Please ensure that this Client ID is kept secure and confidential, as it will be required for all future communications and transactions with us.

We look forward to a long and successful association with you.

Warm regards,
Team StepOne Investing

parameters.subject: Application Response Time Expired – Re-submission Required
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.extractedName }},

We hope you are doing well.

We noticed that we did not receive your confirmation response within the requested 15-minute timeframe regarding your application.

As timely confirmation is required to proceed with the verification process and maintain the project schedule, your previous application session has now expired. To continue, you will need to submit a new application.

We sincerely appreciate your interest in StepOne Investing and are excited about the opportunity to work with you on your investment journey. We encourage you to reapply at your convenience. Once resubmitted, please ensure your confirmation response is sent within the specified time window to avoid delays.

If you need any assistance during the process, our team will be happy to help.

Warm regards,
Team StepOne Investing
